description: The system MUST respond within a reasonable time frame.
title: Performance

description: The system SHALL be available at least 99.9% of the time.
title: Reliability

description: The system MUST protect user data and prevent unauthorized access.
title: Security

description: The system SHALL ensure that user data is handled in accordance with applicable laws and regulations.
title: Privacy

description: The system SHOULD be able to handle a large number of users and CVs without a significant decrease in performance.
title: Scalability

description: The system MUST be easy to use and navigate for all users.
title: Usability

description: The system SHOULD be easy to modify and update.
title: Maintainability

description: The system MUST be compatible with a variety of devices and browsers.
title: Compatibility

description: The system SHOULD be able to integrate with other HR systems and tools.
title: Integration
